name: Nakhon Nayok town center
notes: Primary civic and service core of Nakhon Nayok town with market, municipal, hospital, and daily-errand demand.

name: Nakhon Nayok Hospital
notes: Main provincial hospital and one of the strongest all-day destination anchors in the province.

name: Lotus's Nakhon Nayok
notes: Major retail anchor on the city side, useful for destination and mixed-use charging demand.

name: Ongkharak town center
notes: District center on the Rangsit-Nakhon Nayok axis with recurring resident, food, and everyday-service trips.

name: Srinakharinwirot University Ongkharak Campus
notes: Large education campus with student, staff, and visitor demand connected to the Ongkharak medical cluster.

name: HRH Princess Maha Chakri Sirindhorn Medical Center
source: public medical center references + seed coordinate
notes: Major medical anchor with long dwell time and recurring daily demand on the Ongkharak side.

name: Ban Na town center
notes: Service town and junction node between Nakhon Nayok, Prachin Buri, and Saraburi approaches.

name: Pak Phli town center
notes: East-side service town supporting local community demand and the provincial interior connector.
